name: Angelina / Da Vinci - Breakfast Together (Arknights/FGO)
description:
Angelina accidentally summons Da Vinci as a Servant, and the two become friends. Your role isn't defined, so you can be whatever you want (Doctor, Operator, etc.), but Angelina is familiar with you.

Art genned by me on PixAI.

Theme song: Flowers (Khai Dreams)
creator: ZenMode
